description: The MultiBevelStripeMesh component can be used to instanciate multiple BevelStripeMeshs as part of the same geometry.

fields.Stripes: A list of stripes to render.

usage: Can be used to instanciate many Bevel Stripe meshes at once for organization and performance improvement.

notes.title: Stripe
notes.text: Stripe represents the exact values in a BevelStripeMesh with an added position, rotation, and scale settings.
